Barbie (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $636,785,476Details
International Box Office $810,900,000
Worldwide Box Office $1,447,685,476
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,940,581
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $8,951,124
Total $13,891,705
Further financial details...

Synopsis

To live in Barbie Land is to be a perfect being in a perfect place. Unless you have a full-on existential crisis. Or you’re a Ken.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$162,022,044 (25.4% of total gross)
Legs:3.93 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:44.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$145,000,000 (worldwide box office is 10.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,243 opening theaters/4,337 max. theaters, 9.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $696,136,691

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 21st, 2023 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
September 22nd, 2023 (IMAX) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: July 19th, 2023 (Wide) (France)
July 19th, 2023 (Wide) (Netherlands)
July 19th, 2023 (Wide), released as Barbie (바비) (South Korea)
July 20th, 2023 (Wide) (Brazil)
July 20th, 2023 (Wide) (Croatia)
Video Release: September 12th, 2023 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for suggestive references and brief language.
(Rating bulletin 2787 (cert #54383), 6/14/2023)
Running Time: 114 minutes
Franchise: Barbie
Award nomination: 2024 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Cast, crew, or production detail: F-Rated
Filming location (city or town): Los Angeles, CA
Filming location (country): England, United Kingdom, United States
Plot point: Bad Role Models, Exile, Existential Crisis, Models, Romance, Satire, Woman in a Male Dominated Profession
Subgenre: Satirical Comedy
Source:Based on Toy
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: LuckyChap Entertainment, Mattel Entertainment, Parkes+Macdonald Productions, Playground Productions, Warner Bros., Heyday Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Full financial estimates for this film, including domestic and international box office, video sales, video rentals, TV and ancillary revenue are available through our research services. For more information, please contact us at research@the-numbers.com.


  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

To live in Barbie Land is to be a perfect being in a perfect place. Unless you have a full-on existential crisis. Or you’re a Ken.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$162,022,044 (25.4% of total gross)
Legs:3.93 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:44.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$145,000,000 (worldwide box office is 10.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,243 opening theaters/4,337 max. theaters, 9.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $696,136,691

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 21st, 2023 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
September 22nd, 2023 (IMAX) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: July 19th, 2023 (Wide) (France)
July 19th, 2023 (Wide) (Netherlands)
July 19th, 2023 (Wide), released as Barbie (바비) (South Korea)
July 20th, 2023 (Wide) (Brazil)
July 20th, 2023 (Wide) (Croatia)
Video Release: September 12th, 2023 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for suggestive references and brief language.
(Rating bulletin 2787 (cert #54383), 6/14/2023)
Running Time: 114 minutes
Franchise: Barbie
Award nomination: 2024 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Cast, crew, or production detail: F-Rated
Filming location (city or town): Los Angeles, CA
Filming location (country): England, United Kingdom, United States
Plot point: Bad Role Models, Exile, Existential Crisis, Models, Romance, Satire, Woman in a Male Dominated Profession
Subgenre: Satirical Comedy
Source:Based on Toy
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: LuckyChap Entertainment, Mattel Entertainment, Parkes+Macdonald Productions, Playground Productions, Warner Bros., Heyday Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
